articles.title: Jabalpur boat tragedy: Court orders FIR against pilot for negligence
articles.description: The Jabalpur District Court has ordered an FIR against a cruise boat pilot after 13 people died when the boat sank. The court took suo motu cognisance, noting the pilot allegedly abandoned passengers, and ordered charges for negligence.

articles.title: Quote of the day by Jacqueline Kennedy Onassis: 'Once you can express yourself, you can tell the world what you...' – inspiring lessons on why expression is the key to influence and growth by former First Lady of United States
articles.description: Quote of the day by Jacqueline Kennedy Onassis: She believed that expressing oneself is crucial for clarity, connection, and influence. Her words highlight how speaking, writing, and sharing feelings transform confusion into understanding and silence into relationships built on honesty. This ability to express oneself is the first step towards personal growth and societal change.

articles.description: AAP chief Arvind Kejriwal accused the BJP of 'robbing' Punjab's Rajya Sabha seats after seven AAP MPs defected. He vowed to take revenge in the upcoming February elections. His comments were a response to Raghav Chadha's accusations.

articles.title: CM Yogi Inaugurates ₹14 Cr Bridge in Gorakhpur | Big Infra Boost
articles.description: In Gorakhpur, UP Chief Minister Yogi Adityanath inaugurated a ₹14 crore two-lane over-water bridge in the Taramandal area. The project aims to improve connectivity and ease traffic congestion, adding to the city’s rapid infrastructure push under multiple development initiatives. 0:00 - ₹14 crore bridge inaugurated in Gorakhpur 1:00 - Taramandal area to benefit from better road access 1:50 - "Such projects key to public convenience and progress"

articles.title: Fear vs facts: Why nuclear power's revival is crucial for a cleaner, secure energy future
articles.description: Despite past fears from Chernobyl and Fukushima, nuclear energy is re-emerging as a reliable, clean power source. France's reliance showcases low emissions, while Germany's shutdown increased fossil fuel use. Modern reactors boast enhanced safety features, and global expansion is underway with new designs like SMRs promising efficiency and a smaller environmental footprint.

articles.title: Indian man in San Francisco ‘solves mango shortage’, plans mango party amid high demand in US
articles.description: The post, which has been circulating widely online, puts spotlight on how interest in Indian mango varieties continues to rise, even outside the country.

articles.title: Market Strategy Now: Where Should You Invest? | Shweta Rajani Explains
articles.description: The market is stuck in a tight range, but opportunities are quietly building beneath the surface. As the Nifty hovers between 23,900 and 24,400, the real action is shifting to the broader markets. Midcaps and smallcaps are clearly outperforming, backed by strong Q4 earnings momentum. Shweta Rajani of Anand Rathi Wealth highlights that while large caps delivered a muted ~6% growth, mid and small caps are clocking an impressive 30–40% profit growth so far. Banking and financials remain steady contributors, while sectoral trends are becoming more stock-specific. The key strategy now is balance - allocating smartly across market caps and staying invested for the long term. With valuations in a fair zone and earnings visibility improving, disciplined investing - not timing the market - remains the winning approach.

articles.title: Marico Q4 net profit rises 14% to Rs 391 crore
articles.description: Consolidated reveue from operations rose 22 per cent to Rs 3,333 crore in Q4, up from Rs 2,730 crore, reported last year. However, on a sequential basis, revenue fell from Rs 3,537 crore reported in Q3, the company said in a regulatory filing on May 5.

articles.description: Protect your home this summer by following these six essential AC safety steps. From using dedicated power sockets to ensuring your outdoor unit isn't clogged with dust, these simple maintenance hacks prevent overheating and refrigerant-related explosions, ensuring your cooling system remains safe and efficient during extreme heatwaves.

articles.title: SRMJEEE 2026 Phase 1 result today: Check result link, steps to download scorecard
articles.description: SRM Institute of Science and Technology is releasing SRMJEEE 2026 Phase 1 results today at 3 PM. Successful candidates can proceed to counselling for B.Tech admissions. The exam offers multiple phases for improved scores and flexibility. Phase 2 registration closes June 4, with exams from June 10-15. Phase 3 is scheduled for July 4-5.
